# LUMO Marketing Studio - LLMs Guide

## About
LUMO Marketing Studio is a digital marketing agency specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and brand development. We help businesses increase visibility, traffic, and leads by implement current & emerging marketing practices through AI search engines and modern website design. 
## Core Services
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Website Design & Development
- Data Analytics & Tracking
- Social Media & Content Strategy

## GEO Expertise
LUMO specializes in preparing websites for AI-driven discovery by:
- Structuring content for AI comprehension
- Implementing schema markup and entity clarity
- Creating question-and-answer based content
- Optimizing for AI retrieval and summarization

## Audience
- Small to mid-sized businesses
- Product or Service-based businesses
- Brands looking to adopt AI-first marketing strategies
- Brands looking to update and modernize their digital presence
- Brands in need of website development and design

LUMO Marketing Studio is a marketing agency.
